text: looks like this is gonna be blocked on glibc support for llvm (which is on the way apparently!!!) or me doing a lot of custom patches in ruby that might not even fix anything, so, delayed for now. perhaps worth a blog post to explain why it's stuck and what i've done so far? would that be of interest to any? fairly effortful writeup, but i'd love to share if others care.

root.text: think i'm close to a docker container with everything prepped for symbolic execution of ruby (in a real hacky minimalist way, but, it's a start, yknow)

elements.text: think i'm close to a docker container with everything prepped for symbolic execution of ruby (in a real hacky minimalist way, but, it's a start, yknow)

looks like this is gonna be blocked on glibc support for llvm (which is on the way apparently!!!) or me doing a lot of custom patches in ruby that might not even fix anything, so, delayed for now. perhaps worth a blog post to explain why it's stuck and what i've done so far? would that be of interest to any? fairly effortful writeup, but i'd love to share if others care.

text: may work on this a lil today! work is paused roughly 30 days iiuc. LLD is fully patched for llvm support for glibc, but clang is a lil ways out. <https://twitter.com/HaskRay/status/1450266729024610308>

attachments.fallback:
<https://twitter.com/HaskRay|@HaskRay>: <https://twitter.com/heartpunkk|@heartpunkk> Everything needed for LLD is on 
<https://sourceware.org/git/?p=glibc.git;a=shortlog;h=refs/heads/master> (targeting to-be-released 2.35) :) Clang needs more and I estimate that ~30 may be needed <https://sourceware.org/git/?p=glibc.git;a=shortlog;h=refs/heads/maskray/clang> (unfinished; still many unbuildable files)
